message:
fix(ci): strip UNC prefix in TestHarness canonical_dir for all tests

On Windows, fs::canonicalize returns \\?\C:\... verbatim paths that
corrupt JS runtime path resolution (readFileSync host fallback).
Strip the UNC prefix once in TestHarness::new() so all tests get
clean paths, rather than fixing each test individually.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
